# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const DEFAULTS = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
};

export default async function handler(req) {
  const edgeConfig = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? JSON.parse(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) : {};
  
  const apiKey = edgeConfig.API_KEY || DEFAULTS.API_KEY;
  const dbUrl = edgeConfig.DB_URL || DEFAULTS.DB_URL;

  // Security: Validate API key format
  if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/.test(apiKey)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid API key format' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Security: Validate DB URL format
  if (!/^postgresql:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9]+:[a-zA-Z0-9@.]+$/.test(dbUrl)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid DB URL format' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ apiKey, dbUrl });
}
